hmong.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Kuv nkag — qhia cov lus nug qhib

hmong.allobot_starbound_sage: AlloBot: Tus Txawj Ntse ntawm Hnub Qub
hmong.claim_daily_essence_bonus: Txais qhov nqi ntxiv ntsiab txhua hnub
hmong.daily_bonus_ready: Qhov nqi ntxiv txhua hnub npaj txhij lawm!
hmong.essence_scales_with_how_many_source_to: Cov ntsiab loj hlob raws li ntau npaum li cas cov cuab yeej keeb koj tu.
hmong.welcome_future_sage: Zoo siab txais tos, Tus Txawj Ntse yav tom ntej!
hmong.sage_spells_unlock_when_you_make_progr: Cov khawv koob Txawj Ntse qhib thaum koj kev vam meej hauv LWM cov cuab yeej STEM Lab — Tus Tshawb Nrhiav Qaum Ntuj, Chav Zauv, RoadReady thiab ntxiv. Txhua khawv koob yog ib txoj kev txawj rov qab: koj twv nws los ntawm kev teb ib lo lus nug los ntawm cheeb tsam ntawm cuab yeej ntawd.
hmong.scroll_down_to_yet_to_discover_and_cli: nqes mus rau «Tseem tsis tau pom» thiab nyem lub
hmong.button_that_ll_take_you_to_the_tool_th: ntawm txhua khawv koob. Qhov ntawd yuav coj koj mus rau cuab yeej uas qhib nws.
hmong.allobot_is_watching_your_progress_ever: AlloBot saib koj kev vam meej txhua qhov chaw. Txawm tias ib txoj hauj lwm, teeb meem, los sis kev xyaum nkaus xwb hauv lwm lub cuab yeej yuav pib qhib cov khawv koob ntawm no.
hmong.begin_expedition_3_rooms_boss: 🌌 Pib Kev Mus Tshawb (3 chav → tus thawj)
hmong.open_study_hall_untimed_practice_mode: Qhib Chav Kawm — hom xyaum tsis suav sijhawm
hmong.untimed_drill_no_damage_full_explanati: Xyaum tsis suav sijhawm · tsis muaj kev puas tsuaj · piav qhia tag nrho
hmong.view_your_progress_dashboard: Saib koj daim vijtsam kev vam meej
hmong.accuracy_calibration_sectors_bosses: Kev Raug · kev kho · thaj tsam · cov thawj
hmong.achievement_gallery: Chav yeeb yaj kiab kev vam meej
hmong.ideal_ai_partnership: Kev koom tes AI zoo tshaj
hmong.ai_scaffolds_while_learner_does_most_o: AI txhawb nqa thaum tus kawm ua feem ntau ntawm kev ua hauj lwm txawj ntse. Kev kawm tiag tiag + kev nyab xeeb tsim nyog.
hmong.real_learning_happens_with_ai_assist_t: Kev kawm tiag tiag tshwm sim nrog AI pab. Cov kev sib pauv sib npaug.
hmong.some_learning_some_risk_watch_for_over: Ib qho kev kawm, ib qho kev pheej hmoo. Ceev faj kev vam khom ntau dhau uas nkag mus.
hmong.high_error_cost_low_learner_effort_ai_: Tus nqi yuam kev siab + tus kawm siv zog tsawg + AI hauv lub voj = cov txiaj ntsig tsis ruaj khov uas zoo li raug tab sis tsis ua hauj lwm hauv kev tsim tawm.
hmong.ai_doing_all_the_work_learner_gets_ans: AI ua tag nrho txoj hauj lwm. Tus kawm tau cov lus teb tab sis tsis muaj kev nkag siab. Kev txawj ntawv poob los sis tsis txawj loj hlob.
hmong.ai_workload_inquiry_who_is_doing_the_t: 🔬 Kev Tshawb Nrhiav Nra Hauj Lwm AI — Leej Twg Xav?
hmong.set_ai_assistance_level_learner_effort: Teeb qib kev pab AI, tus kawm siv zog, kev tshiab ntawm txoj hauj lwm, thiab tus nqi yuam kev. Kwv yees lub xeev kev kawm. Tsis muaj qhab nia, tsis muaj kev nthuav tawm.
hmong.task_novelty_1_10: Kev tshiab ntawm txoj hauj lwm (1-10)
hmong.log_this_workload_split: 📋 Sau qhov faib nra hauj lwm no
hmong.your_hypothesis_when_does_ai_assist_he: Koj qhov kev xav (thaum twg kev pab AI pab vs ua mob? Koj yuav kos kab qhov twg?)
hmong.e_g_on_high_novelty_tasks_ai_is_a_brai: piv txwv li, ntawm cov hauj lwm tshiab siab AI yog tus khub xav; ntawm hauj lwm niaj hnub nws luv voj kev txawj...
hmong.ai_assist_learner_effort_sums_to_100_w: Kev pab AI + tus kawm siv zog sib ntxiv > 100 — kev pab ntau dhau ua li cas rau kev kawm tau txais?
hmong.why_does_novelty_matter_for_both_learn: Vim li cas kev tshiab tseem ceeb rau ob qho kev kawm THIAB kev pheej hmoo?
hmong.when_is_ai_doing_90_of_the_work_actual: Thaum twg AI ua 90% ntawm txoj hauj lwm yog qhov kev txiav txim raug tiag? (Lus qhia: tus nqi yuam kev qis, kev tshiab qis, kev tsim tawm raug siv sijhawm.)
hmong.how_would_you_design_a_class_where_ai_: Koj yuav tsim ib chav kawm li cas uas tso cai AI tab sis tsis luv voj kev kawm?
hmong.i_can_explain_why_this_ai_effort_novel: Kuv piav tau vim li cas qhov kev sib xyaw AI/siv zog/kev tshiab/nqi no muab lub xeev no.
hmong.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Lub cuab yeej tshawb nrhiav — tsis muaj qhab nia, tsis muaj kev nthuav tawm, tsis muaj kev nchuav lus teb. «Kev kawm tau txais» yog ib txoj kev kwv yees; kev ntsuas tiag tiag xav tau kev ntsuam xyuas ua ntej/tom qab, cov hauj lwm hloov, kev kuaj khaws cia. Cov teebmeem ntawm kev pab AI txawv raws li cheeb tsam (kev tsim vs kev tshaj lij vs kev xav).
hmong.equip_up_to_3_spells_you_can_only_cast: Npaj txog 3 khawv koob. Koj tsuas twv tau cov khawv koob npaj txhij hauv Kev Mus Tshawb no.
hmong.choose_your_challenge_level: Xaiv koj qib kev sib tw
hmong.pick_what_fits_today_you_can_change_th: Xaiv qhov haum hnub no. Koj hloov tau nws txhua kev mus tshawb. Nyuaj dua = nqi zog ntsiab loj dua.
hmong.loadout_presets: Cov cuab yeej teem ua ntej
hmong.no_presets_yet_build_a_loadout_you_lik: Tsis tau muaj cov teem ua ntej. Tsim ib cov cuab yeej koj nyiam thiab nyem «Khaws qhov tam sim no» kom khaws cia rau zaus tom ntej.
hmong.static_questions_never_run_out_gemini_: Cov lus nug ruaj tsis tag li — Gemini tsim cov tshiab saum toj.
hmong.ai_generated_questions_can_be_wrong_ev: ⚠️ Cov lus nug tsim los ntawm AI tuaj yeem yuam kev (txawm tias cov lus teb tau cim) — yog ib qho zoo li txawv, qhia koj tus xibfwb.
hmong.set_goals_for_this_expedition: Teeb cov hom phiaj rau kev mus tshawb no
hmong.set_your_goals_optional: 🎯 Teeb koj cov hom phiaj (xaiv tau)
hmong.research_specific_goals_improve_perfor: Kev tshawb fawb: cov hom phiaj tshwj xeeb txhim kho kev ua tau zoo + kev tsom mus. Xaiv qhov twg los tau.
hmong.land_5_critical_casts: Ua tau 5 kev twv tseem ceeb
hmong.rewards_fast_correct_retrieval: Muab nqi zog rau kev rov qab ceev + raug
hmong.use_all_3_equipped_spells: Siv tag nrho 3 khawv koob npaj txhij
hmong.rewards_versatility_not_one_trick: Muab nqi zog rau kev muaj ntau yam, tsis yog ib qho kev dag
hmong.finish_run_without_dying: Ua tiav qhov khiav yam tsis tuag
hmong.rewards_strategy_healing_choices: Muab nqi zog rau tswvyim + kev xaiv kho
hmong.interrupt_a_boss_special: Cuam tshuam tus thawj txoj TSHWJ XEEB
hmong.land_a_critical_cast_correct_under_6_s: Ua tau ib kev twv TSEEM CEEB (raug + qis dua 6 vib nas this) los cuam tshuam thiab txo kev puas tsuaj.
hmong.calibrated_you_said_you_knew_it_and_yo: 🎯 Kho lawm: koj hais tias koj paub — thiab koj paub tiag.
hmong.overconfident_felt_sure_but_missed_wor: ⚠ Ntseeg tus kheej ntau dhau: xav tias paub tseeb tab sis plam. Tsim nyog saib zaum ob hauv Chav Kawm.
hmong.lucky_guess_but_maybe_you_knew_more_th: 🎁 Twv muaj hmoov — tab sis tej zaum koj paub ntau dua li koj xav!
hmong.self_aware_you_flagged_the_doubt_and_t: 🎯 Paub tus kheej: koj cim qhov kev tsis ntseeg, thiab qhov tsis ntseeg raug. Ntxiv rau Rov Saib.
hmong.worth_reviewing_this_one: Qhov no tsim nyog rov saib.
hmong.ai_generated_question_the_marked_answe: Lus nug tsim los ntawm AI — cov lus teb tau cim tuaj yeem yuam kev. Yog zoo li txawv, qhia koj tus xibfwb.
hmong.land_5_critical_casts_2: Ua tau 5 kev twv tseem ceeb
hmong.use_all_3_equipped_spells_2: Siv tag nrho 3 khawv koob npaj txhij
hmong.interrupt_a_boss_special_2: Cuam tshuam tus thawj txoj TSHWJ XEEB

hmong.re_study_what_you_got_wrong_mark_got_i: Rov kawm qhov koj yuam kev. Cim «Nkag siab lawm» thaum koj nkag siab.
hmong.what_is_one_thing_you_learned_or_notic: Ib yam koj kawm los sis pom hauv qhov khiav no yog dab tsi? (Kev sau nws txhawb kev nco ntau dua li tsuas xav xwb.)
hmong.e_g_the_bee_flower_question_keeps_trip: piv txwv li, «Lo lus nug muv/paj pheej ua rau kuv dawm — kev sib pab = ob leeg tau txais txiaj ntsig»

hmong.another_expedition: Dua ib qho Kev Mus Tshawb
hmong.spend_essence_to_deepen_the_runes_of_e: Siv ntsiab los ua kom cov rune ntawm txhua khawv koob tob. Qib siab dua = kev puas tsuaj hauv paus ntau dua + tseem ceeb loj dua.
hmong.no_spells_to_upgrade_yet_unlock_spells: Tsis tau muaj khawv koob los txhim kho. Qhib cov khawv koob los ntawm kev ua si lwm cov cuab yeej STEM Lab.
hmong.untimed_practice_no_hp_no_damage_just_: Xyaum tsis suav sijhawm. Tsis muaj HP. Tsis muaj kev puas tsuaj. Tsuas yog kev rov qab + piav qhia. Cov lus nug yuam kev tshwm dua sai dua.
hmong.no_spells_unlocked_yet_play_other_stem: Tsis tau qhib khawv koob. Ua si lwm cov cuab yeej STEM Lab los qhib cov khawv koob, ces rov qab los ntawm no los xyaum.
hmong.choose_a_spell_to_practice: 🧪 Xaiv ib khawv koob los xyaum
hmong.no_questions_in_the_review_queue_eithe: Tsis muaj lus nug hauv kab rov saib. Yog tias koj tsis tau ua si txaus, los sis koj ua tau zoo heev. Sim Chav Kawm rau kev xyaum pheej hmoo qis, los sis pib ib qho kev mus tshawb.
hmong.back_to_spellforge: Rov mus rau Chaw Ntaus Khawv Koob

hmong.no_weak_spots_flagged_yet_keep_casting: Tsis tau muaj qhov tsis muaj zog cim. Twv ntxiv mus!
hmong.confidence_calibration_health: 🧠 Kev Noj Qab Haus Huv ntawm Kev Kho Kev Ntseeg
hmong.when_you_say_you_know_it_and_you_do_th: Thaum koj hais tias koj «paub» thiab koj paub tiag — qhov ntawd yog kev kho. Kev tsis sib haum (ntseeg ntau/tsawg dhau) yog tus nqi zais ntawm kev kawm.
hmong.no_reflections_saved_yet_after_each_ex: Tsis tau muaj kev xav khaws cia. Tom qab txhua kev mus tshawb, sau ib yam koj pom los sis kawm. Koj tus kheej yav tom ntej yuav ua koj tsaug.
